decks.notes: This Izzet Control deck focuses on using spells and abilities to control the board and disrupt the opponent's strategy. By utilizing cards like Tablet of Discovery for card advantage, Firebending Lesson for removal, and Combustion Technique for damage, the deck aims to outsmart and outlast the opponent. The inclusion of powerful creatures like Thor, God of Thunder and Gran-Gran provide additional threats and win conditions. With a mix of control elements and efficient spells, this deck aims to dominate the game and secure victory through careful planning and strategic play.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly build up a board presence and overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures. By utilizing cards like Llanowar Elves and Fabled Passage to ramp up mana, the deck aims to play high-impact threats like Sazh's Chocobo and Earthbender Ascension early on. With a mix of creatures and support spells like Defend the Rider and Meltstrider's Resolve, the deck looks to maintain pressure on the opponent while also protecting its own creatures. The goal is to quickly establish dominance on the battlefield and push for a fast victory.

This deck focuses on quickly building up board presence and dealing damage to the opponent as fast as possible. It utilizes spells like Burst Lightning and Flow State along with creatures like Eddymurk Crab and Slickshot Show-Off to control the board and pressure the opponent. Multiversal Passage helps to fix mana and ensure a smooth curve. The deck also includes counterspells like Spell Pierce to protect its threats. Overall, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells to secure a quick victory.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize a combination of card draw, removal, and mana ramp to control the game until you can unleash powerful finishers like Thor, God of Thunder and Jeskai Revelation. Utilizing Izzet Control cards like Combustion Technique and Riverpyre Verge, you aim to maintain board control while cycling through your deck with Accumulate Wisdom and Tablet of Discovery. The deck also includes some key support cards like Stock Up and Abandon Attachments to disrupt your opponent's strategy. Overall, this deck focuses on card advantage and board control to outlast your opponent.

This deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with early aggressive creatures and efficient mana ramp, utilizing cards like Llanowar Elves and Earthbender Ascension. The deck also includes cards that can provide card advantage and additional resources, such as Escape Tunnel and Fabled Passage. By quickly building a board presence and utilizing removal spells like Demolition Field, the deck aims to finish the game before opponents can stabilize. With a strong focus on ramping up quickly and applying pressure, this mono green aggro deck aims to secure victories through early aggression and efficient creature synergies.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game by using a combination of removal spells, card draw, and powerful payoff cards to outvalue and outlast the opponent. By utilizing Izzet colors, the deck focuses on maximizing card advantage and generating incremental advantage over time. Cards like Abandon Attachments and Combustion Technique help control the board, while Accumulate Wisdom and Tablet of Discovery provide card draw to keep the engine running smoothly. The deck also includes powerful finishers like Jeskai Revelation and Thor, God of Thunder to close out the game once it has taken control.

The deck focuses on utilizing powerful graveyard-based combos to bring back powerful creatures and disrupt opponents. By manipulating the graveyard and utilizing cards like Restless Reef and Stock Up, the deck can quickly set up its combos and overwhelm opponents. With cards like Doomsday Excruciator and Superior Spider-Man, the deck can quickly close out games by bringing back powerful creatures and devastating opponents. The deck also includes disruption cards like Duress to control the board and keep opponents on the back foot.

The main concept of this deck is to gain control of the game through a combination of card draw, removal spells, and powerful creatures. By using cards like Jeskai Revelation and Combustion Technique, the player can draw cards, deal damage to opponents' creatures, and control the board. The deck also includes powerful finishers like Thor, God of Thunder to close out games. The inclusion of Abandon Attachments and Gran-Gran allows for additional card advantage and flexibility in dealing with threats. Overall, the strategy revolves around out-valuing the opponent and setting up powerful plays.

This deck focuses on utilizing a variety of control spells and abilities to disrupt the opponent's strategy while drawing cards and generating advantage. The key strategy is to maintain a defensive position while slowly building up resources and generating card advantage through drawing cards and utilizing efficient removal spells. The deck also includes some win conditions such as Jeskai Revelation and Combustion Technique to close out the game once the opponent has been worn down. It aims to outlast and outplay the opponent through careful resource management and smart decision-making.

The main concept of this Selesnya Aggro deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a swarm of efficient creatures and pump spells, aiming to quickly outpace and overpower them before they can stabilize. The deck includes a mix of powerful threats like Craterhoof Behemoth and The Unbeatable Squirrel Girl, along with support cards like Michelangelo's Technique and Nature's Rhythm to boost the team's power and resilience. By playing aggressively and utilizing the mana ramp from Llanowar Elves and Shang-Chi, the deck aims to establish an early advantage and keep the pressure on the opponent.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game by using a combination of card draw, removal, and counterspells while building up a strong board presence with powerful creatures and spells. The deck features a variety of spells that allow you to manipulate the board state and disrupt your opponent's strategy, while also providing card advantage and resilience. By carefully managing your resources and timing your plays effectively, you can outmaneuver your opponent and secure victory through a combination of tempo advantage and overwhelming card advantage.

The deck focuses on utilizing powerful combo pieces to reanimate key creatures from the graveyard in order to overwhelm the opponent with a powerful board presence. By carefully managing resources and utilizing various spells and abilities, the deck aims to set up a deadly combo that can quickly turn the tide of the game in its favor. Additionally, the deck includes disruption and card draw elements to control the game and find the necessary combo pieces to execute its game plan effectively.

This deck focuses on using a combination of spell cards and creatures to control the game and outmaneuver opponents. By utilizing powerful cards like Combustion Technique and Fire Magic, along with creatures like Thor, God of Thunder and Gran-Gran, the player can control the board and dictate the pace of the game. The key strategy is to efficiently use resources and make calculated plays to gain the advantage and ultimately emerge victorious. The synergy between cards like Accumulate Wisdom and Tablet of Discovery allows for card advantage and consistent card draw to maintain control throughout the game.

This deck focuses on control through a combination of powerful spells, card advantage, and mana fixing. It aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy while setting up its own win condition. By utilizing a mix of removal, counterspells, and draw spells, it seeks to maintain board control and outvalue the opponent in the late game. With a mix of land destruction, card draw, and versatile spells, this deck looks to control the game's pace and dictate the flow of play until it can secure a win through its powerful finishers and card advantage engines.

This deck focuses on quickly deploying aggressive creatures and using spells like Burst Lightning and Boomerang Basics to control the board and deal direct damage to the opponent. The key strategy is to maintain a fast pace of play, using card draw spells like Opt and Sleight of Hand to find the necessary cards to close out the game. By combining efficient creatures with versatile spells, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent early on and maintain pressure throughout the game.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming your opponent with aggressive creatures and ramping up mana with cards like Llanowar Elves and Fabled Passage. Earthbender Ascension and Mightform Harmonizer provide buffs to your creatures, while Demolition Field and Escape Tunnel help control the board. Use cards like Sazh's Chocobo and Ba Sing Se to keep the pressure on your opponent, and finish them off with powerful creatures like Surrak, Elusive Hunter. The key strategy is to establish board presence early and maintain pressure throughout the game.
